entry_exit.entry: Buy at market open the day after a sentiment spike signal.
entry_exit.exit: Sell when sentiment reverts below the 7-day average or after 5 trading days, whichever comes first.

signal_logic.trigger: Signal triggers when the daily sentiment score for a ticker increases by more than 30% compared to its 7-day moving average sentiment score, with at least 100 posts mentioning the ticker that day.
